hero.title: Breathe. Focus. Restore.
hero.subtitle: Science-backed breathing techniques to calm your mind and sharpen your focus.

techniques.title: Four Techniques. Infinite Calm.
techniques.subtitle: Each method is grounded in clinical research and optimized for daily practice.

box.name: Box Breathing
box.description: Inhale, hold, exhale, hold — 4 seconds each. Used by Navy SEALs for stress control.

478.name: 4-7-8 Breathing
478.description: Inhale 4s, hold 7s, exhale 8s. Dr. Weil's technique for instant calm and sleep.

coherent.name: Coherent Breathing
coherent.description: 5 breaths per minute. Synchronizes your heart rate and nervous system.

wim.name: Wim Hof Method
wim.description: Controlled hyperventilation followed by retention. Boost energy and immunity.

privacy.title: Your Data Stays Yours
privacy.subtitle: No servers. No tracking. No ads.
points: All data stored on-device or your private iCloud
No third-party SDKs — no Firebase, no analytics
In-app purchases processed by Apple only

steps.title: Choose Your Technique
steps.description: Pick from four science-backed breathing methods.

steps.title: Follow the Pacer
steps.description: Beautiful animated guide syncs with your breath.

steps.title: Track Your Progress
steps.description: HealthKit integration logs your mindfulness minutes.
